revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[commons:" to "[[co:commons:"
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[co:commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[co:commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23177433986|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[co:commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[co:commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Coord_missing%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates) and is easily converted, by adding them, into {{tl|coord}}. == Usage == {{tlx|Coord missing|region name}} === Parameters === *;region name: Either one of the country names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country]], or a smaller area, such as a state or province, where that sub-subcategory exists or is warranted. Where a particular country cannot be identified, one of the continent names used in the subcategories of [[:Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by continent]] should be used instead. ::The categories are [[WP:hidden categories|hidden categories]]. To view hidden categories, one needs to activate them at {{Show hidden categories}}. If a category is renamed, leave a category redirect page at the old name, as this template resolves category redirects. E.g. by default the parameter "Washington, D.C." would populate [[:Category:Washington, D.C. articles missing geocoordinate data]], but this is redirected, so the template instead populates the target [[:Category:Washington, D.C., articles missing geocoordinate data]]. === Removal of template === The template should be removed when coordinates are added to the article. A bot occasionally removes it from all articles that already use {{tl|coor URL}}. === Error tracking === * [[:Category:Unclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where no region name is supplied * [[:Category:Misclassified articles missing geocoordinate data]]
For pages where the region name does not match a valid category == Template data == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "This template is used to mark articles without geolocation data (coordinates). Use the {{coord}} template to add geographical data.", "params": { "1": { "label": "Region name", "description": "The name of the area this article details. Please refer to 'Category:Articles missing geocoordinate data by country' and its subcategories for accepted values.", "type": "string", "required": false } } } == Adding coordinates == {{coord how-to}} * [[Wikipedia:Obtaining geographic coordinates|Obtain the coordinates]] * Use the appropriate infobox parameters, or {{tl|coord}}. * Follow the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (dates and numbers)#Geographical coordinates|Manual of Style]]. * Please don't be [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates#Precision|overly precise]]. == See also == * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Geographical coordinates|WikiProject Geographical coordinates]] * {{tl|Place missing}} {{Sandbox other| | [[co:commons:Template:Location possible]] [[de:Vorlage:Lagewunsch]] [[pt:Predefinição:Falta-geodata]] }} [[Category:Coordinates templates]] [[Category:Cleanup templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
